info.title: Uown TMS Service API
info.description:
# Uown TMS Service API

REST API for telephony management: account summaries, payments, due dates, and activity logs.

## Authentication

Send your API key in the `Authorization` header on every request. Contact your Uown integration contact for credentials and key provisioning.

## Environments

Use the server dropdown: **Sandbox** for testing, **Production** for live traffic.

servers.description: Sandbox Server - Testing and integration environment for partners

tags.name: UOWN TMS SERVICE API
tags.description: Telephony Management System API - Account, payment, due date and activity operations

post.description: Finds active primary accounts matching phone, SSN, or date of birth. Returns up to 5 results.

requestBody.description: Search criteria with at least one identifier (phone, SSN, or DOB)

post.description: Updates TCPA and AI opt-out preferences for a phone number on the account
Adjusts receivable due dates forward or backward by specified number of days

get.description: Retrieves all active bank accounts associated with the account
Retrieves all tokenized credit cards on file for the account
Returns the credit card configured for automatic payments, if any

post.description: Executes payment transactions (ACH and/or credit card) for a payment arrangement
Initiates an ACH (Automated Clearing House) bank payment
Executes a single credit card payment transaction
Creates a PayNearMe payment link for the account and delivers it via SMS and/or email.

parameters.name: amountOverride
parameters.description: Optional payment amount override for the PayNearMe link

get.description: Calculates the total amount required to pay off the account
Retrieves comprehensive account details including balance and status

post.summary: Adjust the next payment due date for an account
post.description: Moves a payment due date forward by a specified number of days. Maximum offset is 3 days for weekly frequency accounts and 7 days for all other frequencies. Only the specified payment for the specified due date is moved.

requestBody.description: Adjustment parameters: dueDate, offset (number of days to move forward, range: 0-7; max 3 days for weekly frequency accounts)

200.description: Payment due date adjusted successfully. Returns updated due date information.

400.description: Invalid request — possible causes: offset exceeds the allowed maximum (3 days for WEEKLY frequency, 7 days for all other frequencies), provided due date does not match the account's next due date

422.description: Account has no pending due date available to be moved

apiKeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. Include your API key in the Authorization header.
apiKeyAuth.name: Authorization

comments.description: Optional free-form operator comment appended to the ACH record

bankAccountId.description: Saved bank account id for this account

routingNumber.description: ABA routing number (required when not using bankAccountId)

accountNumber.description: Account number (required when not using bankAccountId)

bankName.description: Bank name (optional when using keyed account details)

accountHolderFirstName.description: Account holder given name (optional; primary customer used when omitted)

accountHolderLastName.description: Account holder family name (optional; primary customer used when omitted)

designateAutoPay.description: When true, designates this bank account for autopay

BankAccountDetails.description: Saved bank account or keyed bank details

BillingAddress.description: Optional billing address associated with the card

creditCardId.description: Id of a tokenized card on file for the account

ccNumber.description: Primary account number (PAN); required for keyed card payments

ccExp.description: Expiration date in MM/YY format (keyed card)

autoPay.description: When true, designates this card for autopay (keyed or on-file)

CardDetails.description: Card on file or keyed card details

postingDate.description: Effective posting date for the payment

allocationStrategy.description: How the payment allocates across receivables

chargeFee.description: Charge an additional processing fee when applicable

comment.description: Optional note stored on the transaction

ErrorResponse.description: Standardized error response following REST best practices

last4SSN.description: Last 4 digits of the customer's Social Security Number

FindAccountRequest.description: Search criteria. At least one of phone, last4SSN, or dob must be provided.

offset.description: Number of days to move the due date forward (0–7). For WEEKLY frequency accounts the maximum is 3 days.
